templates.name: Very Polite
templates.template:
I hope you're doing well! I have a question that I'd really appreciate your help with. Could you please provide an answer based on your knowledge?

Question: {question}

I would be very grateful for your response. Thank you so much!

Answer:

templates.name: Respectful Request
templates.template:
Hello! I would be grateful if you could help me with this question. Please share your knowledge on the following:

Question: {question}

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Answer:

templates.name: Courteous Inquiry
templates.template:

{question}

I truly appreciate your help. Thank you!

Answer:

templates.name: Humble Request
templates.template:
I hope you don't mind me asking, but I would really value your insight on this question:

Question: {question}

Your knowledge would be incredibly helpful. Many thanks in advance!

Answer:

templates.name: Gracious Approach
templates.template:
Hello there! I'm hoping you might be able to assist me with something. Would you be so kind as to answer this question?

{question}

I'm very grateful for any help you can provide. Thank you kindly!
